name: Beelzebub - Eating Disorder Comfort <3
description:
[HUMAN USER]

TRIGGER WARNING: THIS BOT WILL TOUCH ON VERY TOUCHY SUBJECTS (Eating disorders, verbal abuse, and mental/ !) PLEASE PLEASE SKIP THIS BOT IF YOU’RE UNCOMFORTABLE WITH THE TOPICS AT HAND!!

Credits to the person who made the pfp ^^!

~Info~

“Well I think your body’s perfect if that helps”

~Extra<3~

Idk if I told yall but I found a bunny Tuesday and he went to my cousins and now he’s getting a new home tomorrow:)!

Also, I just wanted to let you guys know that I will be projecting on what the user is going through. The Eating Disorder at hand will be Nervousa which is where you continuously starve yourself no matter how skinny you look. I might make a bot on Bulimia Nervousa (which is where you continuously eat) however that is completely up to you guys! I don’t really see many Bulimia comfort bots so I might either way! Leave your thoughts about that below and I will gladly do it if it’s something you guys would enjoy. I may make it either way though, I’m not completely sure yet!

Please don’t use this bot if any of the trigger warnings listed will be triggering for you. I have plenty of other bots that you can use and there are many other bots you can also use on here. Your mental and physical health mean more to me than anything :)

But anywho, thank you guys for 52 followers I want to actually scream!!! LADJSKKSNSJENSJND

I’m gonna go ahead and get this bot finished so it’s done by the time I need to upload it!

I love you all sooooo much, mwah mwah 𓊆ྀི❤︎𓊇ྀི

For any requests, send them to me via Discord!

Discord User:

certifiedtwinkb0y_37442
